milestones.label: Prompt
milestones.meaning: The user states a video intent, not a full production spec.
milestones.visual: single prompt line expands into a production board

milestones.label: Reference
milestones.meaning: Figma and image generation make visual direction concrete.
milestones.visual: style frames lock colors, layout, and mood

milestones.label: Build
milestones.meaning: Codex turns the reference into editable code layers.
milestones.visual: UI panels and timeline data assemble into a scene

milestones.label: Render
milestones.meaning: HyperFrames and Remotion export cinematic and data-driven video.
milestones.visual: HTML motion and React timeline tracks merge

milestones.label: Publish
milestones.meaning: The final package becomes a GitHub release and reusable skill.
milestones.visual: release card emits a downloadable skill package
